title: Delete a Tick
preconditions: Campaign has more than one tick
postconditions: The selected tick is removed and subsequent timeline states are recalculated
trigger: GM clicks 'Delete' on a specific tick

main_scenario.action: GM selects to delete a specific tick on the timeline
System warns the GM that deleting this tick will alter historical state and impact subsequent ticks
System deletes the tick, cascades the state from the preceding tick to all subsequent ticks, and refreshes the timeline

exceptions.action: System aborts deletion and leaves the timeline unchanged

exceptions.condition: GM tries to delete the initial Tick 1
exceptions.action: System prevents deletion of Tick 1 and displays an error message

acceptance_criteria: A tick can be deleted by the campaign owner.
A warning is displayed indicating historical impact.
State from the prior tick correctly cascades to future ticks after deletion.
